_note: Modeled list prices used to convert trace token usage (gen_ai.usage.*_tokens) into a per-ticket cost_usd and the cost-per-merged-PR metric. Phase 1 is a flat Claude Code subscription, so this dollar figure is an ESTIMATE for relative efficiency, not a bill; in Phase 2 (Anthropic API on a VM) it is the real spend. Update rates as Anthropic list prices change. cost_usd = input_tokens/1e6*input + output_tokens/1e6*output. The 'default' entry prices any model not listed so an unknown model never silently zeroes a cost.
